scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,API -c auto "EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 expo start --web" "npm run start:api"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n WEB,API -c auto "EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 expo start --web" "DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://productiv:productiv@localhost:54329/productiv_local} DIRECT_DATABASE_URL=${DIRECT_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://productiv:productiv@localhost:54329/productiv_local} DATABASE_SSL_MODE=disable GOOGLE_INTEGRATION_PROVIDER=local AI_PROVIDER=${AI_PROVIDER:-ollama} OLLAMA_BASE_URL=${OLLAMA_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:11434} OLLAMA_MODEL=${OLLAMA_MODEL:-qwen3:4b} WEB_APP_URL=${WEB_APP_URL:-http://localhost:8081} npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.dev:mobile: concurrently -n APP,API -c auto "npm run start" "npm run start:api"
scripts.local: npm run local:up && npm run local:ai:pull && npm run local:reset && npm run dev:local
scripts.local:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d productiv-postgres ollama
scripts.local:ai:pull: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d ollama && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml exec ollama ollama pull ${OLLAMA_MODEL:-qwen3:4b}
scripts.test:local: npm run local:reset && RUN_LOCAL_INTEGRATION_TESTS=1 DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://productiv:productiv@localhost:54329/productiv_local} DIRECT_DATABASE_URL=${DIRECT_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://productiv:productiv@localhost:54329/productiv_local} DATABASE_SSL_MODE=disable GOOGLE_INTEGRATION_PROVIDER=local AI_PROVIDER=deterministic WEB_APP_URL=${WEB_APP_URL:-http://localhost:8081} npm --prefix backend run test:local
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run lint
